description: Post-procedure assessment — central venous catheter placement, complication surveillance

input.clinical_context:
47yo M, MICU. Right subclavian CVC placed 30 minutes ago by attending under ultrasound guidance.
Patient currently on 35% venti-mask, SpO2 94%. Breath sounds equal bilaterally. No respiratory
distress noted. CXR pending. Site dressing intact, no bleeding. Line flushed, good blood return
on all ports.

author: dev
